title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Instamojo

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Instamojo
jsonLd.description:
We at Instamojo are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Instamojo:
Instamojo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Instamojo!
